en: Talking to me, you know, I have something for you. I was gonna save it for graduation
But after what you did, I think I'll give it to you now
Yo season tickets to the Clippers right courtside, haha, I
There's something I need to tell you what is it
They were from my locker What?
Uncle Phil, I was just keeping them in case I needed them
How could you be so stupid? You know, you shouldn't be messing with drugs. I know uncle Phil
I mean somebody gave them to me at school. I mean, I didn't mean for Carlton to take him
I didn't even know if I was gonna take him. I'm sorry uncle Phil
My son could have died because of you
